title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026: Tamil-speaking electorate holds key to Devikulam constituency
description: The Devikulam constituency will feature a notable “battle of Rajas,” with candidates F. Raja from the UDF, A. Raja from the LDF, and S. Rajendran of the NDA. Rajendran’s shift to the BJP could disrupt traditional voting patterns, while local residents express concerns over unresolved issues like housing and healthcare.
